query: SELECT 'before_est_midnight' as period, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(amountUsd AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as spent FROM orders WHERE createdAt < '2026-03-13 04:00:00' UNION ALL SELECT 'after_est_midnight', COUNT(*), SUM(CAST(amountUsd AS DECIMAL(18,2))) FROM orders WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-13 04:00:00';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qjSsefs24zghQG.d5f38dec7f6c --database YZ9v9D6zNEEycYVBBKJ8og --execute SELECT 'before_est_midnight' as period, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(amountUsd AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as spent FROM orders WHERE createdAt < '2026-03-13 04:00:00' UNION ALL SELECT 'after_est_midnight', COUNT(*), SUM(CAST(amountUsd AS DECIMAL(18,2))) FROM orders WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-13 04:00:00';
